response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Strong cross-stack proficiency with JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and mobile app development
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentorship
Limited documentation of experience leading organizational change or roadmap planning at scale
Mobile experience is incidental (iOS app maintenance), not deep or strategic in platform ecosystems
